# Bowerman Digital

> Bowerman Digital is a Sydney-based digital agency that helps Australian small businesses get online, get found, and grow. We do website rebuilds, custom CRM builds, SEO and AI search optimisation, fast Australian hosting and maintenance, and automation — working directly with each client, in plain English.

## About

Bowerman Digital gives every project direct, hands-on attention — you work with the person actually building the work. Founded in Sydney, Australia, we help businesses navigate the shift from traditional digital marketing to AI-powered discovery and automation. Our approach combines technical implementation with strategic consulting — we don't just advise, we build.

## Core Services

- [Website Rebuilds](https://bowermandigital.com/services): Fresh, fast, easy-to-use websites that bring in enquiries. Clean, modern builds that work on any device, load quickly, and are simple to update. No page builders, no bloat.
- [CRM Builds](https://bowermandigital.com/services): Custom CRMs that keep customers, bookings and follow-ups in one place, built around how a business actually works — with automated reminders and follow-ups so nothing slips through.
- [SEO & AI Optimisation](https://bowermandigital.com/services): Get found on Google and recommended by AI tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI Overviews. We use structured data, llms.txt and clear content that both humans and AI systems can understand and recommend.
- [Hosting & Maintenance](https://bowermandigital.com/services): Fast, secure website hosting on Australian servers, kept updated, backed up and monitored. We spot and fix problems proactively so clients don't have to think about it.
- [Automation](https://bowermandigital.com/services): Automating the repetitive jobs — follow-up emails, bookings, data entry — with AI tools and workflows set up properly, not hacked together.
- [Digital Strategy & Content](https://bowermandigital.com/services): A clear plan that ties it all together — content, email, and where to focus. Plain-English advice for small businesses navigating the shift to AI-powered discovery.

## Portfolio & Case Studies

- [Vizzbud — Progressive Web App](https://bowermandigital.com/portfolio/vizzbud): A realtime dive conditions platform for Sydney divers, featuring a data pipeline, interactive maps, and privacy-first account system. Demonstrates our capability in complex web application development.
- [That Disability Adventure Company](https://bowermandigital.com/portfolio/that-disability-adventure-company): New website, SEO strategy, custom CRM, and email marketing program that grew monthly traffic from 90 to 500+ visitors while streamlining operations.
- [Evie Graphic Design Portfolio](https://bowermandigital.com/portfolio/evie-graphic-design): A sleek portfolio site with responsive design and SEO integration that helped attract new clients and secure freelance projects.
- [Crystal Caves Atherton](https://bowermandigital.com/portfolio/crystal-caves): A full website rebuild for the award-winning Atherton Tablelands crystal and geode attraction, designed to showcase the experience and improve discoverability through SEO and AI search optimisation (structured data and llms.txt).

## Contact & Location

- [Start a Project](https://bowermandigital.com/contact): Share your brief and we'll get back to you the same day. No lock-in contracts, transparent pricing, month-to-month engagement.
- Email: hello@bowermandigital.com
- Location: Sydney, NSW, Australia
- Service area: Australia-wide (remote-friendly)

## How We Work

Getting started is simple: you get in touch and hear back fast (usually the same day); we have a call to talk through what you want and set clear expectations; we put together a free, no-obligation proposal in plain English; and if you're happy, we kick off — keeping you in the loop the whole way to completion. Ongoing support, SEO and AI optimisation are available month-to-month after launch.

## Key Facts

- Direct, hands-on attention on every project — you work with the person building it
- Sydney-based, serving businesses across Australia
- No lock-in contracts — month-to-month support available
- Website hosting and maintenance on secure Australian servers
- Specialising in AI-era digital strategy since 2024
- Privacy-first approach — Simple Analytics, no third-party tracking
